title: We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said.
author: Scott Clement, Eric Lau, Isabelle Gibson
fullText: Fifty-two percent of Americans oppose the strikes, and two-thirds say the Trump administration hasn’t clearly explained the goals of the military action.
summary: Fifty-two percent of Americans oppose the strikes, and two-thirds say the Trump administration hasn’t clearly explained the goals of the military action.
